name: Rapid Decarbonisation — Net-Zero Push
description: An aggressive global decarbonisation drive. Designed for the renewable-share and CO₂ sample datasets. On renewable_energy_share.csv it pushes the renewables share of electricity upward (capped at 100%); on co2_emissions.csv, flip the signs to model falling per-capita emissions. Front-loaded effort tapers as the cheapest abatement is exhausted. Tested against samples/renewable_energy_share.csv.
author: data-isc
